npm axios recent hack issue - Description: Investigate security vulnerability in recent npm axios package version, potential data leakage risk

The recent incident involved a security vulnerability in the Claude codebase interacting with the Axios npm package, leading to unauthorized data access. The issue was first reported on 2023-10-15 after users noticed unusual API requests. Further investigation revealed that an outdated Axios version (v1.3.2) was susceptible to a prototype pollution exploit, which allowed attackers to inject malicious payloads. The incident has been escalated for immediate patching.
